title: Document gc-arena runtime GC scaffolding
body:
Added **gc-arena** workspace members and documented how runtime GC **scaffolding** connects to the JIT allocator hooks—what is traced, what is arena-allocated, and where collection may run.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`98240ca`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/98240ca)
- **Subject:** Add gc-arena workspace members and runtime GC scaffolding documentation
- **Completed:** 2026-02-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-execution-jit-gc`

## Relation
v0.0 deliberately pursued a **simple** GC research line (`gc-arena`) before any parallel collector work (later **abfall** / phase-B runtime). Paired with `gc-arena-crate-integration` and Phase 5 completion to close the execution/GC deliverable.

source.subject: Add gc-arena workspace members and runtime GC scaffolding documentation
